preprocessing_steps: Load CSV file into pandas DataFrame
Extract unique Product_ID values to form the product set P
Create dictionary mappings for each parameter by grouping DataFrame by Product_ID and extracting the respective column values
Store parameters as dictionaries keyed by Product_ID for easy access in optimization model

sets.name: P
sets.description: Set of all products to consider for production planning

parameters.description: Profit per unit of product i
Machine A hours required per unit of product i
Machine B hours required per unit of product i
Labor hours required per unit of product i
Raw material units required per unit of product i
Minimum production requirement for product i
Maximum market demand for product i

mapping_explanation: Product_ID column maps to index i in set P
Profit_Per_Unit column maps to parameter c_i (objective coefficient)
Machine_A_Hours_Req column maps to parameter m^A_i (Machine A resource coefficient)
Machine_B_Hours_Req column maps to parameter m^B_i (Machine B resource coefficient)
Labor_Hours_Req column maps to parameter l_i (Labor resource coefficient)
Raw_Material_Units_Req column maps to parameter r_i (Raw material resource coefficient)
Min_Production_Requirement column maps to parameter L_i (lower bound on production)
Max_Market_Demand column maps to parameter M_i (upper bound on production)
assumptions: Resource capacities C^A, C^B, C^L, C^R are external constraints not provided in the CSV and must be specified separately
All Product_ID values are unique and valid indices for the optimization model
All parameter values are non-negative where physically meaningful
Missing or null values in the CSV are assumed to not exist in the clean dataset
full_script:
import pandas as pd

# Load data
df = pd.read_csv('optimization_pipeline_test_easy.csv')

# Define the set of products
P = sorted(df['Product_ID'].unique())

# Define parameters as dictionaries keyed by product ID
c_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Profit_Per_Unit'].to_dict()
m_A_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Machine_A_Hours_Req'].to_dict()
m_B_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Machine_B_Hours_Req'].to_dict()
l_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Labor_Hours_Req'].to_dict()
r_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Raw_Material_Units_Req'].to_dict()
L_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Min_Production_Requirement'].to_dict()
M_i = df.set_index('Product_ID')['Max_Market_Demand'].to_dict()

# Note: Resource capacities C^A, C^B, C^L, C^R must be provided externally
# Example:
# C_A = 1000  # Machine A hours available
# C_B = 800   # Machine B hours available
# C_L = 2000  # Labor hours available
# C_R = 500   # Raw material units available
